name: SmartSlate Polaris
description: Premium glassmorphic presentation theme for SmartSlate Polaris learning blueprints
author: SmartSlate Team

fonts.sans: 'Lato', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif
fonts.serif: 'Quicksand', Georgia, Cambria, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif

defaults.favicon: data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 100 100'><rect fill='%23a7dadb' width='100' height='100' rx='20'/><text x='50' y='67' font-size='60' text-anchor='middle' fill='%23020c1b' font-weight='bold' font-family='sans-serif'>SP</text></svg>

default.description: Standard content slide with left-aligned text

section.description: Section divider with large title and optional number

table.description: Enhanced table layout with glassmorphic styling
